description: Weekly prediction market volume snapshots. Updated each RESEARCH scan.

snapshots.notes: COMBINED WEEKLY RECORD: $5.9B (Kalshi $3.4B + Polymarket $2.5B). Kalshi overtook Polymarket for first time on weekly volume, driven by March Madness sports trading. Kalshi at 57.2% weekly share. KEY DECOUPLING: prediction market volume at ATH despite crypto bear market. Polymarket fee expansion goes live March 30.
snapshots.source: Polymarket.com, CBS News, CoinGabbar, multiple outlets

snapshots.notes: NCAA March Madness driving sports surge (+32% WoW). Iran war geopolitics markets active ($464M+, 540+ markets). Polymarket fee expansion effective March 30.

snapshots.polymarket_notable: Record $500M+ on US-Iran war markets (Polymarket traders bet $529M on US-Iran war at peak)
snapshots.notes: Record geopolitics volume driven by Feb 28 US-Israel strikes on Iran.
January 2026 all-time high for monthly sector volume.
2026 projection of $40B represents 400% increase over 2024 levels.

trends.counter_cyclical_thesis: CONFIRMED 2026-03-29: prediction market volume at ATH while crypto market is in extreme fear (Fear&Greed 12). Demand driven by uncertainty, not BTC price. LEVER's TAM grows with geopolitical instability, not with bull markets.

three_structural_pillars.midterm_elections: $4.1M+ and growing, conditional markets with 15% WoW growth

trends.trajectory: Volume elevated since 2025 US election cycle. No sign of reversion. Geopolitics has replaced elections as primary driver in March 2026. Iran ceasefire rejection (March 28) extends uncertainty indefinitely.
